title: lithocarpus corneus var. hainanensis
intro: Lithocarpus corneus var. hainanensis, also known as the Hainan tanbark oak, is a plant species in the beech family Fagaceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus corneus var. hainanensis include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
